name: Hannes Duve
tagline: Full-stack & mobile — Next.js, Expo, and cloud backends
bio: I build web apps and React Native (Expo) products end to end: SaaS on Next.js and Supabase, freelancer tooling with Prisma and Stripe, AWS pipelines with Lambda and Remotion, and Firebase- or Amplify-backed mobile apps. I care about clear UX, testable architecture, and shipping maintainable systems.
